0: Take a breath and remember [Trait 1]. Is this scroll aligned with that part of you?
Think about [Goal 1]. Does staying here help you move toward it?
10: You've been here for a while. Someone with [Trait 2] might choose differently right now.
If you lived fully as [Role 1] today, what would you do next instead of scrolling?
15: Picture the version of you who truly embodies [Trait 3]. What would they do now?
Is this helping you be the kind of [Role 2] you want to be?
20: Long scrolls can pull you away from [Goal 2]. Is there a small step toward it you can take now?
Imagine looking back tonight as [Role 3]. How do you wish you had spent this time?

0: Notice your body. Where do you feel [Stress 1] right now?
Gently bring your attention to your [Breath]. Follow three full inhales and exhales.
10: Imagine you are in your calming place: [Place]. Let that scene fill your mind for a few moments.
Visualize your [Mental Color] slowly filling the screen and softening your attention.
15: Pause and feel one simple sensation: [Tactile Recall]. Stay with it for three breaths.
Notice the pull to keep scrolling. Can you rest your attention on your body instead, just for a moment?
20: Feel the weight of your body as a [Gravity Anchor] holding you in place, not the feed.
Bring awareness to [Limb Symmetry]—how both sides of your body rest right now.

0: Before you continue, trace the shape of an imaginary square slowly in the air with your finger.
Type the word "PAUSE" slowly in your mind, one letter at a time.
10: Press your thumb and finger together ten times, counting each press before you scroll again.
Move your attention from your toes up to your head, naming each body part before continuing.
15: Imagine tensing and then relaxing a distant muscle: [Distant Muscle]. Notice the shift before moving on.
Close your eyes for ten slow heartbeats before deciding what to tap next.
20: Slowly breathe in for four counts, hold for four, and out for six before choosing to keep or stop scrolling.
Set a simple rule: after this message, either switch apps or put the phone down for one minute.

0: Take a brief pause. Do you want to keep scrolling right now?
Notice how you feel in this moment before continuing.
10: You’ve been here for a while. Is this how you want to spend the next few minutes?
Check in: Are you scrolling with intention or out of habit?
15: Imagine what else you could do with the next 10 minutes. Does anything sound better than this feed?
Would a short break from the screen feel helpful right now?
20: Long sessions can blur together. Is now a good time to step away for a bit?
If you paused now, what small, restful action could you take instead?
